title: less linear eyes of ender
description: make ender eyes craftable with wind charges and prismarine shards
body:
[![Kinetic Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1af71189dede4258766a75b4957acefce1910966.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1406)

Make ender eyes craftable with Breeze Rods, Prismarine Shards, and Resin Clumps ([Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/project/6xwxDTgf) required for 1.21.1)

This is fully editable with the tag #lleoe:end_eye

![Prismarine recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/728170f202767d05a9fc947513084e934aca725c.png)
![Resin recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b53e4c2ecd18844bb987e000a39397c28e6ba586.png)
![Breeze rod recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed885359554a92d24a439e02ba765f428829a7ea.png)


**Instalation**

For the datapack version, go to the datapacks tab when creating a world, click the button to open the datapacks folder and drag the datapack inside, it should appear in the left side of the screen, after that enable it like you would do with an experimental datapack.

For the mod version (on windows), right click the start button and and go to execute, then enter %appdata% on it, this will open a folder, go to the .minecraft and then mods, drag the .jar there.
